---
name: Erratum
about: Report a mistake in the text, maths, a figure, or an exercise
title: "[erratum] "
labels: erratum
---

**Location**
Chapter / section, and the figure or equation label if applicable
(e.g. `fig:cont3d:lorenzattractor`, `eq:disc1d:lyapdef`). A link to the page on
<https://mvreeuwijk.github.io/chaosbook/> is ideal.

**What is wrong**
Describe the error.

**Correction (if you have one)**
What it should say instead.

**Edition**
Maple (default) / other.
